failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG DES exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Maintain feed reservoir pressure above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Solid formation or impurities in the flow path
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement regular maintenance and monitoring of flow path

failure_modes.mode: Inadequate quenching leading to thermal runaway
failure_modes.mitigation: Install redundant quench systems and monitor temperature closely

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Test pump operation at varying temperatures to assess cavitation risk
Simulate blockage in BPR valve and measure flow impact
Evaluate quench system performance under thermal reaction conditions
